calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Christopher LaVigne, Esq. (415-872-3200; Christopher.Lavigne@withersworldwide.com) of Withers Bergman LLP for Petitioner.
Claire Cochran, Esq. (415-580-6019; claire@clairecochranlegal.com) for Respondent.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) re: final arbitration decision submitted to court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER PAYWARD, INC. D/B/A KRAKEN'S Hearing On Petitioners Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment is GRANTED. Counsel to submit a separate proposed order and judgment in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
